document_api_meta.title: List Opportunity
document_api_meta.env_desc: Search and retrieve a paginated list of opportunity leads available to the authorized seller, with optional filters by type, status, category, etc and ordered by the algorithm ranking model.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: page_size
request_query_param.desc: Number of results per page. Max: 100. Default: 20.

request_query_param.name: page_token
request_query_param.desc: Pagination token from previous response. Omit for first page.

request_query_param.name: locale
request_query_param.desc: Expressed using {language_code}-{COUNTRY_CODE}, in accordance with the BCP-47 standard.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: opportunity_type
request_body_param.desc: Type of opportunity: PRODUCT（品线索）/ KEYWORD（词线索）/ CATEGORY（类目线索）

request_body_param.name: category_ids
request_body_param.desc: Filter by category IDs. Leave empty to return all leads that available to the seller.

request_body_param.name: create_time_ge
request_body_param.desc: Filter opportunities created after this time. timestamp in seconds

request_body_param.name: create_time_lt
request_body_param.desc: Filter opportunities created before this time. timestamp in seconds

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^^reference_images
response_param.desc: Reference product images of the product to list.

response_param.name: ^^^query_words
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop in-site user search keyword.

response_param.name: ^^^opportunity_type
response_param.desc:
Type of opportunity: PRODUCT（品线索）/ KEYWORD（词线索）/ CATEGORY（类目线索）
Empty return for a specific opportunity type indicates the business team has not enabled merchant submission for this lead type in the corresponding market.

response_param.name: ^^^brand_name
response_param.desc: Brand requirements for products specified by the opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^est_market_gmv
response_param.desc: Estimated overall market sales GMV in USD.

response_param.name: ^^^search_volume
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop in-site user search volume.

response_param.name: ^^^competitor_product_count
response_param.desc: Number of competing products currently listed.

response_param.name: ^^^video_view_pv
response_param.desc: The cumulative short video view count of all videos associated with this product opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^tags
response_param.example: Pencarian teratas,Pencarian trending,Persaingan rendah,Trending di TikTok,Terlaris

response_param.name: ^^next_page_token
response_param.desc: Pagination token from previous response. Omit for first page.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func product202604ListOpportunityPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.ProductV202604API.Product202604OpportunitiesQueryPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.PageSize(20)
    request = request.PageToken("100")
    request = request.Locale("en-US")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody := product_v202604.NewProduct202604ListOpportunityRequestBody()
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody.SetOpportunityType("PRODUCT")
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBodyCategoryIdsList := []string{"601310","601311"}
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody.SetCategoryIds(product202604ListOpportunityRequestBodyCategoryIdsList)
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody.SetCreateTimeGe(1775976752)
    product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody.SetCreateTimeLt(1776976752)
    request = request.Product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody(*product202604ListOpportunityRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

sample_code.label: Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to sync your product information to TikTok Shop(s). For products available in the EU markets, this also includes the information of the Responsible Persons and Manufacturer.
scope_list.auth_info: The Partner will be able to sync your product information to TikTok Shop(s). For products available in the EU markets, this also includes the information of the Responsible Persons and Manufacturer.
